ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ssds" (
  "ssd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSD */,
  "prod_name" TEXT /* Name of the SSD product */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Density of the SSD in GB */,
  "avail_sparf" TEXT /* Availability status (F for available, T for unavailable) */,
  "avg_ec" TEXT /* Average error count */,
  "crit_warning" INTEGER /* Critical warning level (0 for no warning, other values for warnings) */,
  "hrs_n" TEXT /* Health rating status */,
  "percent_used" TEXT /* Percentage used of the SSD */,
  "poc" TEXT /* Power on count */,
  "poh" TEXT /* Power on hours */,
  "spor" TEXT /* Spare count */,
  "stime" TEXT /* Start time */,
  "sys_type" TEXT /* System type (e.g., Desktop, Laptop) */,
  "tbw_gb" TEXT /* Total bytes written in GB */,
  "media_error" INTEGER /* Binary representation of media errors */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the SSD */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Purchase date of the SSD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the storage location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, data center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ssd_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "ssd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSD being used */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the SSD is stored or used */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date when the SSD was last used */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the SSD (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "total_usage_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours the SSD has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssd_usage_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES inventory_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssd_usage_ssd_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssd_id") REFERENCES ssds ("ssd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "ssd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSD that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., usage alert, critical warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ssd_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssd_id") REFERENCES ssds ("ssd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "ssd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSD that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., software update, hardware replacement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_ssd_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssd_id") REFERENCES ssds ("ssd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "ssd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SSD being ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the SSD was ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of SSDs ordered */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_ssd_id FOREIGN KEY ("ssd_id") REFERENCES ssds ("ssd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
